# The Pangalactic Gargleblaster: A Cautionary Guide

The Pangalactic Gargleblaster is widely regarded as the best drink in existence. Its effect has been described as "like having your brain smashed out by a slice of lemon wrapped round a large gold brick."

The recipe, originally devised by Zaphod Beeblebrox (ex-President of the Galaxy, current fugitive), involves ingredients from at least four different star systems and one substance that technically doesn't exist yet. Attempting to list the ingredients here would violate seven local ordinances, three galactic treaties, and at least one law of thermodynamics.

Health warning from the Galactic Medical Board: consumption of more than three Pangalactic Gargleblasters in a single sitting has been known to cause temporary omniscience, involuntary time travel, and a persistent belief that you are a sofa. The Galactic Medical Board strongly advises against operating starships, positronic devices, or parliamentary democracies while under the influence.

The drink is served in a glass that is larger on the inside than the outside, which is the least confusing thing about it.
